title: Petface Feather Tail Mice Plush Cat Toy, Filled with Natural Catnip, Safe Stimulation for Pet Playtime (Pack of 2)
features: PLAYFUL DUO: Keep your feline friend entertained for hours with this pack of 2 plush cat toys featuring feather tails
ENRICHMENT: Perfect for indoor and outdoor play, these interactive toys provide mental and physical enrichment
FEATURES: Adorable mice design with fluttering feather tails to awaken your pet's hunting instincts
QUALITY MATERIALS: Made by Petface, known for durable and engaging pet toys that stand the test of time

TOY SAFETY: This toy is strong but not indestructible, and will eventually become susceptible to ‘chew’ damage, please supervise your pet with this toy, examine regularly for wear, and replace if any damage could be seen a health hazard
description: From the manufacturer Petface - your pets best friend - whether it's collars, leads, feeding, bedding or toys our product experts design with your pet in mind! The Petface range is of the highest quality and provides fun, innovative and interactive products to keep your pets fit, healthy and enjoying life! Shop for your favourite dog, cats and wild bird products for great value! Petface Mouse Cat Toys Most house cats don't get the correct amount of exercise. Give your cat a workout by using these Feather Tail Mice Cat Toy to play with them. Allows them to stalk, jump, paw and use up some energy. Enjoy hours playing with your cat in a super fun way, a perfect bonding experience for you and your pet. ABOUT PETFACE All your needs are covered with the Petface range, including collars, leads, toys, feeding, coats and bedding. The designers at Petface have ensured the range has a co-ordinated look and style making sure your pets will be the ‘best dressed in town’. TREAT YOUR PAMPERED PET Treat your pet to their very own Feather Tail Mice Cat Toy to keep them entertained. Stimulates a cat's senses through touch, sound, sight and smell. Cat's love birds and birds have feathers, just like this toy! PERFECT FOR INTERACTIVE PLAY Enjoy hours playing with your cat in a super fun way, the perfect balance between playtime and necessary scratching, whilst encouraging them to exercise to keep them fit and healthy. The perfect mix of birds and mice, your kitten's favourite!
